description: Shipping certificate from Nahray b. Nissim probably to Moshe b. Yahya al-Majani. Around 1065. Detailed the coins that were in a coin packet. Verso: Details about several dinar amounts, as well as the name b. al-Majani. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #301) VMR
tags: coin, Nahray B. Nissim, dinar, account, lading, trade
description_he: תעודת משלוח מנהראי בן ניסים, כנראה למשה בן יחיא אל-מג'אני, כ-1065, פירוט מטבעות בחבילת מטבעות
